speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: The town is ta’en.

speaker: SOLDIER
text: ’Twill be delivered back on good condition.

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: Condition?

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: I would I were a Roman, for I cannot,

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: Being a Volsce, be that I am. Condition?

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: What good condition can a treaty find

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: I’ th’ part that is at mercy? Five times, Martius,

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: I have fought with thee; so often hast thou beat me

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: And wouldst do so, I think, should we encounter

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: As often as we eat. By th’ elements,

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: If e’er again I meet him beard to beard,

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: He’s mine, or I am his. Mine emulation

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: Hath not that honor in ’t it had; for where

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: I thought to crush him in an equal force,

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: True sword to sword, I’ll potch at him some way

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: Or wrath or craft may get him.

speaker: SOLDIER
text: He’s the devil.

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: Bolder, though not so subtle. My valor’s poisoned

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: With only suff’ring stain by him; for him

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: Shall fly out of itself. Nor sleep nor sanctuary,

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: Being naked, sick, nor fane nor Capitol,

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: The prayers of priests nor times of sacrifice,

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: Embarquements all of fury, shall lift up

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: Their rotten privilege and custom ’gainst

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: My hate to Martius. Where I find him, were it

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: At home, upon my brother’s guard, even there,

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: Against the hospitable canon, would I

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: Wash my fierce hand in ’s heart. Go you to th’ city;

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: Learn how ’tis held and what they are that must

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: Be hostages for Rome.

speaker: SOLDIER
text: Will not you go?

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: I am attended at the cypress grove. I pray you—

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: ’Tis south the city mills—bring me word thither

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: How the world goes, that to the pace of it

speaker: AUFIDIUS
text: I may spur on my journey.

speaker: SOLDIER
text: I shall, sir.
